title: DiffDock: Diffusion Steps, Twists, and Turns for Molecular Docking
abstract: A diffusion generative model over the non-Euclidean manifold of ligand poses for molecular docking, with confidence estimates and strong top-1 success on PDBBind.

title: GeoDiff: a Geometric Diffusion Model for Molecular Conformation Generation
abstract: A geometric diffusion model for molecular conformation generation with equivariant Markov kernels and strong results on multiple conformation benchmarks.

title: ProGen: Language Modeling for Protein Generation
abstract: A 1.2B-parameter protein language model trained on about 280M sequences for controllable protein generation with taxonomic and keyword conditioning.

title: Molecular Contrastive Learning of Representations via Graph Neural Networks
abstract: A self-supervised molecular representation learning framework that uses graph augmentations and contrastive objectives to improve downstream molecular property prediction after fine-tuning.
